docs.name: Infinite Marquee
docs.description: Seamless infinite-scrolling ticker with pause-on-hover and variable speed.

props.name: children
props.description: Individual cards, images, or elements you want scrolling seamlessly.

props.name: className
props.description: Styling classes mapping to the outer tracking viewport.

props.name: speed
props.description: Scrolling velocity, representing translation pixels per second.

props.name: pauseOnHover
props.description: Temporarily pause the animation sequence when a user points at the element.

props.name: gap
props.description: Consistent spacing separating each repeated instance loop.

docs.overview: InfiniteMarquee continuously scrolls a row of items horizontally, looping seamlessly. It's commonly used for logo strips, testimonial tickers, and feature highlights.

scenarios.title: Client logo strip
scenarios.description: Showcase trusted brand logos below the hero section to build social proof.

scenarios.title: Bidirectional feature ticker
scenarios.description: Two rows scrolling in opposite directions create depth and visual interest for a features section.
